mlb.headline: Rangers place Evan Carter on 10-day IL with oblique strain
mlb.summary: The Rangers placed outfielder Evan Carter on the 10-day injured list due to an oblique strain after he left Friday's game in the fourth inning.

mlb.headline: Shohei Ohtani back in Dodgers' lineup after resting knee
mlb.summary: Shohei Ohtani was back in the Dodgers' lineup for Saturday's game against the White Sox, returning from a one-game absence due to knee inflammation.

mlb.headline: Braves place RHP Spencer Strider on IL with elbow inflammation
mlb.summary: The Braves placed starting pitcher Spencer Strider on the 15-day injured list on Saturday with inflammation in his right elbow.

mlb.headline: MLB betting tips for Saturday: Cardinals offense piling up runs
mlb.summary: All of the odds, recommended prop bets and trends in baseball for Saturday, June 13.

mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
mlb.summary: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

mlb.headline: Fantasy Baseball Reliever Depth Chart
mlb.summary: Our updated reliever depth chart displays the closer hierarchy for each team, as well as the fatigue factor in each MLB bullpen.

nhl.headline: Vegas Golden Knights rule out William Karlsson for Game 6
nhl.summary: Center William Karlsson, injured in his team's Game 5 loss Thursday night, was ruled out by the Vegas Golden Knights on Saturday, a day before the Carolina Hurricanes, up 3-2 in the series, will try to win the Stanley Cup in Game 6 at T-Mobile Arena.

nhl.headline: Carolina fan chants 'just noise,' says Knights goalie Carter Hart
nhl.summary: Knights goalie Carter Hart, who is gearing up for Game 6 of the Stanley Cup Final, says chants from Hurricanes fans referencing a 2024 sexual assault charge he was later acquitted of are "just noise."

nhl.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes favored to win Cup, Staal new fave for Conn Smythe
nhl.summary: The Carolina Hurricanes are heavy favorites to clinch the second Stanley Cup in team history.

nhl.headline: Carolina takes 3-2 series lead into game 6 against Vegas
nhl.summary: Carolina Hurricanes (53-22-7, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Vegas Golden Knights (39-26-17, in the Pacific Division)

nhl.headline: Watch Stanley Cup Final Game 6 on Sunday at 8 p.m. ET on ABC and ESPN App
nhl.summary: Watch Stanley Cup Final Game 6 on Sunday at 8 p.m. ET on ABC and ESPN App

nhl.headline: PWHL's Minnesota Frost re-signs Stecklein, Zumwinkle
nhl.summary: Defender Lee Stecklein and forward Grace Zumwinkle are staying put in Minnesota after the PWHL's Frost re-signed both players on Friday.

nba.headline: Ticketmaster says no valid Game 5 tickets will be revoked
nba.summary: After blowback from Knicks fans and New York officials, Ticketmaster clarified that no tickets to Game 5 in San Antonio will be revoked.

nba.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks move to -500; Anunoby in hunt for MVP
